decisions.title_en: Pope Leo XIV's Magnifica Humanitas encyclical formally released at Vatican Synod Hall with Anthropic's Chris Olah on the launch panel
decisions.reason: Previously published 05-18 (encyclical title announced) and 05-23 (launch lineup with Olah replacing Clark + Pope personally attending). Today is the actual public release of the full text at 11:30 a.m. Vatican time — this is the substantive event itself, not pre-event reporting. Title and detail must focus on the released text's content and the live presentation, not the prior buildup.

decisions.title_en: Stripe Sessions 2026 ships 288 launches — Stripe Projects GA, Google AI Mode payment partnership, Tempo blockchain agent payments protocol
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Stripe Sessions 2026 ran May 22-24 with 288 launches total — agentic commerce going mainstream with Google, Wix, BigCommerce; Stripe Projects GA with 32 providers; streaming stablecoin payments on Tempo. Major industry-shaping event.

decisions.title_en: GitHub CISO confirms ~3,800 internal repos exfiltrated via 18-minute trojanized Nx Console VS Code extension — OpenAI, Grafana, Mistral also breached
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Distinct from 5-19 mini-shai-hulud-npm-attack (npm/OIDC vector). This is a VS Code Marketplace supply chain attack via Nx Console v18.95.0 live for 18 min on 5-18; GitHub CISO publicly confirmed 3,800-repo exfiltration on 5-20-21. Downstream victims include OpenAI, Grafana, Mistral AI.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic in early talks to rent Microsoft Maia 200 AI chips — would add Microsoft silicon to Claude's already-diversified Nvidia/Trainium/TPU stack
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. The Information broke 5-21 that Anthropic and Microsoft are in early discussions for Anthropic to adopt Maia 200; would be Microsoft's first major external Maia customer (Maia has been Azure-internal only). Anthropic CEO publicly cited 'compute difficulties' earlier this month. Strategically significant for the multi-silicon picture.

decisions.title_en: Newsom signs first-of-its-kind California AI workforce executive order one day after Meta layoffs — WARN Act revisions, AI impact dashboard, displaced-worker programs
decisions.source: Office of Gov. Newsom / CalMatters / StateScoop
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Direct contrast to Trump's withdrawn federal EO on 5-21 the same day. California's first-of-its-kind state AI workforce order: WARN Act revisions, state AI impact dashboard, recommendations for displaced workers, all due within 180 days. Significant state-vs-federal split on AI policy.

decisions.title_en: Leaked April 30 audio: Zuckerberg describes Meta's mandatory 'Model Capability Initiative' tracking keystrokes/Gmail/VSCode to train AI — drops same day 8,000 layoffs hit
decisions.source: More Perfect Union (leaked audio) / IBTimes UK / eWeek
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Distinct from 5-19 meta-8000-ai-layoffs (focused on layoffs and Wang reorg). Today's story is the surveillance program — keystrokes, mouse clicks, Gmail/GChat/VSCode/Metamate monitoring under 'Model Capability Initiative' — revealed by leaked April 30 all-hands audio that More Perfect Union published 5-20, same day as layoffs.

decisions.title_en: ElevenReader licenses 200,000 human-narrated audiobooks at $11/mo — directly targets Audible; same-day Spotify launches its own ElevenLabs audiobook tool
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. ElevenLabs ($11B val) acquired licensing rights to 200K human-narrated audiobooks for its ElevenReader app at $11/month — first credible Audible competitor at scale. Same-day Spotify launched its own ElevenLabs-powered audiobook creation tool, signaling ElevenLabs is the audiobook AI backbone for both consumer-facing and creator-facing platforms.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic $30B/$900B round details extended in Yahoo/IBTimes recaps
decisions.reason: Already published 5-22 with title 'Anthropic $30B+ 新轮下周敲定 $900B+ 估值: Sequoia / Dragoneer / Altimeter / Greenoaks 各 ~$2B 共领投'. Today's coverage is the same Bloomberg 5-22 scoop being recycled; no confirmation the round has actually closed, no new investor disclosures, no new terms. DROP until close is confirmed.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI S-1 filing follow-up commentary across analysts
decisions.reason: Already published 5-22 with title 'OpenAI 周五真把 S-1 递了'. Today's coverage is analyst commentary on the same filing; no new SEC actions, no roadshow date, no terms. DROP.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic Glasswing initial update wolfSSL detail
decisions.reason: Already published 5-22 with title 'Project Glasswing 首份数据落地: Mythos Preview 一个月扫出 10,000+ 高危漏洞'. The wolfSSL exploit example and 2-week patch-cycle commentary are details within the same announcement. DROP.

decisions.title_en: MIT Tech Review analysis: Google I/O shows AI-driven science shifting from specialized to agentic
decisions.reason: Already published 5-19 with title 'Google 5-19 一夜把 AlphaEvolve + AI Co-Scientist + WeatherNext 揉进单一 "Gemini for Science"'. MIT TR 5-22 piece is analytic commentary on the same I/O announcement and the Hassabis 'foothills of singularity' line is from the same keynote. DROP.

decisions.title_en: Trump AI EO leak follow-up commentary
decisions.reason: Already published 5-22 with title 'Trump 撤签后 24 小时: 完整 AI 行政令草案被 Politico / Axios 同步泄露'. No new movement on signing this week; the EO remains delayed indefinitely. DROP.

decisions.title_en: Huang $200B 'CPUs for AI agents' market commentary post-earnings
decisions.reason: Already published 5-20 with title 'Nvidia Q1 FY27 实盘: $816 亿营收 / $752 亿数据中心'. The $200B CPU market quote is from the same earnings cycle (5-20-21). DROP.

decisions.reason: Already published 5-20 with title 'SpaceX 5-20 公开 S-1'. Today's coverage repeats S-1 details; roadshow date (June 8) is too distant to drive a separate brief. DROP.
